hook.say: Helen Slater says Milly Alcock is "astonishing" as the new Supergirl.

lines.say: The original Supergirl gave her blessing to the DCU's new Kara Zor-El.

lines.say: Alcock leads an ensemble cast in the upcoming 2026 film Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow.

captions.instagram: The original Supergirl, Helen Slater, has given her stamp of approval to Milly Alcock's upcoming portrayal of the hero in "Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow"! Slater called Alcock "astonishing" and praised her "fierce, strong, and great comic timing." With the movie adapting Tom King's acclaimed comic and rumors of Jason Momoa's Lobo appearing, the DCU is building something big. Will this Supergirl finally soar? #Supergirl #MillyAlcock #HelenSlater #DCU #WomanOfTomorrow #JasonMomoa #Lobo #DCComics #MovieNews
captions.facebook: The original Supergirl has spoken! Helen Slater is singing Milly Alcock's praises for her role in the upcoming "Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow" film. She called Alcock "astonishing" and noted her "fierce, strong, and great comic timing." The movie is set to adapt Tom King's acclaimed comic run, with a rumored appearance by Jason Momoa as Lobo. Are you excited for this new take on Supergirl?

pinterest.title: Original Supergirl Helen Slater Praises Milly Alcock's Performance!
pinterest.description: Helen Slater, the original Supergirl, gives her glowing approval to Milly Alcock's portrayal in the upcoming DCU film "Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow." Slater called Alcock "astonishing" and highlighted her "fierce, strong, and great comic timing." The movie is based on Tom King's acclaimed comic run and is set for a 2026 release, with a potential appearance by Jason Momoa as Lobo. Get ready for a new era of Supergirl!

youtube.title: Original Supergirl Helen Slater PRAISES Milly Alcock! #Shorts
youtube.description: The original Supergirl, Helen Slater, is officially on board with Milly Alcock's casting in the DCU's upcoming "Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow" film! Slater called Alcock "astonishing," praising her "fierce, strong, and great comic timing." The movie, set for 2026, adapts Tom King's acclaimed comic run and will feature an ensemble cast, with rumors of Jason Momoa as Lobo. What do you think of this endorsement? Full story at The Screen Report, link in bio.

captions.x: The original Supergirl, Helen Slater, is all in on Milly Alcock's casting! She called the new DCU Supergirl "astonishing" with "fierce, strong, and great comic timing." The 'Woman of Tomorrow' film adapts Tom King's comic. Will it fly? #Supergirl #DCU

spoken: Helen Slater says Milly Alcock is "astonishing" as the new Supergirl. The original Supergirl gave her blessing to the DCU's new Kara Zor-El. Alcock leads an ensemble cast in the upcoming 2026 film Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow. She first appeared as Supergirl in 2025's Superman. Slater told The Hollywood Reporter she "loved the new Supergirl film." She added that Alcock was "fierce, strong, and great comic timing!" The movie adapts Tom King's acclaimed comic run. Jason Momoa is rumored to appear as Lobo. Will this Supergirl finally soar?
